Fields.Name: Apply MapGdRegionID for GPARAM Enabled

Fields.Name: Override MapGdRegion ID
Fields.Description: Overwrite the ID used for cutscene weather Gparam (-1: No overwrite. MapGD local ID during cutscene playback is used). If Do you want to apply MapGD local ID to weather Gparam? Is x, it is not referenced.
